DP.525.0000:
[0103,0000] examined the ancient
cave painting.\f
Mysterious designs cover a whole
section of the wall.\f
There are three strange things
forming a triangle.\f
In the middle of them, a shining
sphere?\f
What is this all about?\f
DP.525.0001:
The cave painting’s meaning seems
to be this...\f
There existed a being...\f
A being so powerful, it was
considered a deity at the time.\f
Opposing this powerful being
were three Pokémon.\f
The three kept balance with the
being, as if they formed a triangle.\f
It’s an ancient legend of Sinnoh
that is still told in Celestic Town.\f
DP.525.0002:
Oh, yes. I found something useful.
You should take this.\f
It belonged to my granddaughter,
but she doesn’t use it anymore.\f
DP.525.0003:
If a Pokémon learns Surf, it can
carry you across water and the sea.\f
But my granddaughter said something
about this hidden move...\f
Oh, yes! To use Surf outside of
battle, the Hearthome Gym Badge\r
must first be obtained.\f
On that matter, you will have to
handle it yourself, I’m afraid.\f
